# Passive Flows And Expiry Mechanics

Passive flows can amplify mechanically driven moves around expiry windows when positioning is crowded and rebalance demand is one-sided.

Index and ETF flows are not the whole story, but they are often a meaningful part of the short-horizon path of price.
